headline: Run zones now — 3 days dry, 99°F Friday.
weather_notes: Run both zones this morning — 3 days dry entering 97°F today and 99°F Friday with zero rain forecast.
Hand-check e1–e4 transplant root zones after irrigation — 18-day tomatoes in sustained 97–99°F heat may need spot watering between cycles.
Do all garden work before 8 AM through Friday — back-to-back 97–99°F closes every afternoon outdoor window this week.
Check potato bag moisture daily — bags lose moisture 2–3× faster than ground beds in sustained extreme heat.

surfaced_tasks.title: Tip new blackberry primocanes if 3–4 ft tall
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Thursday — canes logged June 14 are now 24 days old and likely at tipping height; tip before continued 97–99°F heat stresses new laterals after pinching.

suggested_tasks.title: Check c2–c4 beans for first pod set
suggested_tasks.description: At 41 days, Red Swan and Jade Bush are 10–14 days from 55-day maturity — confirm pod set now and watch for heat-induced blossom drop in this week's 97–99°F stretch.
